Shaping future leaders through academic excellence and character development. Our secondary program prepares students for success in national examinations and higher education.

Years of Excellence

Class Levels

Six years of comprehensive secondary education

JSS 1
10-11 years

Introduction to secondary education

JSS 2
11-12 years

Building foundational knowledge

JSS 3
12-13 years

Junior WAEC/BECE preparation

SSS 1
13-14 years

Subject specialization begins

SSS 2
14-15 years

In-depth subject mastery

SSS 3
15-16 years

WAEC/NECO/JAMB preparation

Curriculum & Subjects

Comprehensive subject offerings for JSS and SSS levels

Junior Secondary School (JSS 1-3)
A broad curriculum covering all foundational subjects
English Language
Mathematics
Basic Science
Basic Technology
Social Studies
Civic Education
Christian Religious Studies
Nigerian Languages
French
Computer Studies
Physical & Health Education
Creative Arts
Home Economics
Agricultural Science

Why Choose Elyon Secondary?

At Elyon Secondary School, we combine rigorous academics with character formation to produce graduates who excel in national examinations and are prepared for university education.

Qualified graduate teachers
Modern science laboratories
Computer laboratory
Well-stocked library
Sports facilities
Career counseling
JAMB preparation classes
Extracurricular activities

Exam Focus

Dedicated preparation for WAEC, NECO, and JAMB examinations

Excellence

Consistent outstanding performance in external examinations

Mentorship

Career guidance and university admission counseling

Growth

Clubs, societies, and leadership opportunities

Begin Your Journey to Success

Join Elyon Secondary School and get the quality education you need to achieve your academic and career goals.

Footer

Elyon Schools

Est. 1994

Nurturing young minds from Nursery through Secondary education. Building tomorrow's leaders with excellence in academics, character, and values.
